lessons.title: Types of Directors and The Duty to Act in Good Faith
lessons.description: Section 2(1) of the Companies Act 2014 tells us that "director" includes any person occupying the position of director, by whatever name called.

lessons.title: Duty to Avoid Conflicts of Interest and the Duty of Skill, Care, and Diligence
lessons.description: In our last lesson, we looked at the duty to act in good faith and for a proper purpose.

lessons.title: Remedies for Breach of Directors' Duties
lessons.description: This lesson is absolutely critical for your FE-1 exam preparation. The examiners have made it clear, in their own reports, that when you discuss directors' duties, you must also discuss the remedies for breach.
